Motecloud CLI v0.2.0

Quick install (copy files)
1) Copy `motecloud.py` (and optional `motecloud.sh`) to your machine.
2) Ensure Python 3.10+ is available.
3) Set environment variables:
   - MOTECLOUD_BASE_URL (optional, default: https://motecloud.io)
   - MOTECLOUD_TENANT_ID (required)
   - MOTECLOUD_TENANT_TOKEN or MOTECLOUD_API_KEY (required)
4) Run:
   python3 motecloud.py --help

Examples
- Prime context:
  python3 motecloud.py prepare --task "Investigate regression" --agent "jules"
- Open session:
  python3 motecloud.py session open --id "jules_pr_123" --agent "jules"
- Append event:
  python3 motecloud.py session append --id "jules_pr_123" --content "Found issue in auth.py"
- Close session:
  python3 motecloud.py session close --id "jules_pr_123" --summary "Applied fix and validated"

Security notes
- HTTPS is required by default.
- Use --allow-http only for trusted local development endpoints.
- Redirects are blocked to avoid token leakage.
